pr.title: Match and improve hsd_3AA7, quatlib, and ftCo functions
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2580 matched or improved functions across sysdolphin baselib hsd_3AA7, baselib quatlib, and ftCommon ftCo_Shouldered. The PR body claims seven new 100% matches and improvements to MatToQuat plus several hsd_3AA7 functions; the GALE01 bot report confirms seven new matches, thirteen unmatched-item improvements, and +2332 matched-code bytes.

key_files.role: Primary large decomp-matching target; changed CARD-related dispatcher/control-flow, retry loops, builder/write paths, local value lifetimes, volatile declaration, and multiple functions reported as new matches or improved.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: lists hsd_3AA7 matches and improvement areas
text_corpus: GALE01 report lists six new hsd_3AA7 100% matches and twelve hsd_3AA7 improvements
raw_diff: hsd_803AAA48 switch/control-flow and CARD async changes

key_files.role: MatToQuat cleanup and near-match improvement by changing local declaration order/lifetimes, expression structure, and temporary naming.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: MatToQuat sc0/sc1/sc2 removed, scale introduced, q3 declaration moved

key_files.role: Small ftCo_8009C744 match fix involving stack padding, victim/fighter object use, and re-enabling ftColl_80078710 call.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: ftCo_8009C744 listed as new 100% match
raw_diff: PAD_STACK(8), ftCo_800DC920(fp->victim_gobj, gobj), ftColl_80078710(vic_gobj, gobj, &fp->dmg.facing_dir_1)

what_changed.text: Seven functions became 100% matches: ftCo_8009C744, fn_803ACF30, fn_803ADE4C, fn_803B21E8, fn_803B1F78, hsd_803B2374, and fn_803AC168.
Thirteen unmatched items improved, led by hsd_803AAA48 from 28.60% to 77.68%, fn_803B1338 from 37.08% to 84.80%, fn_803AF3F0 from 48.20% to 83.22%, and MatToQuat from 95.55% to 99.92%.

hsd_3AA7.c was substantially rewritten around CARD command dispatch: type access moved through cmd->type, switch cases were reshaped/reordered, retry loops around CARDFastOpen/CARDReadAsync/CARDWriteAsync/CARDClose were expanded, and several accesses use cmd->state directly instead of a separate state local.

MatToQuat removed sc0/sc1/sc2 temporaries, introduced a clearer scale temporary, moved q3 declaration before nxt/lenCol, and recomputed normalized diagonal terms inline in trace and branch comparisons.

ftCo_8009C744 replaced a dummy u8 stack array with PAD_STACK(8), used fp->victim_gobj in one call, and replaced a commented ftColl_80078710 placeholder with an actual ftColl_80078710(vic_gobj, gobj, &fp->dmg.facing_dir_1) call.

smart_moves.text: The PR kept verification evidence close to the claimed matches: PR body names configure --require-protos, ninja, and GALE01 100% results; the bot report gives per-symbol before/after percentages.
For MatToQuat, replacing anonymous scale temporaries sc0/sc1/sc2 with a single role-based scale temporary improved readability while also improving the match score.
The hsd_3AA7 dispatcher changes made command type access explicit through the CardCmd view, e.g. cmd->type rather than entry->x10, which better communicates the structure being manipulated.

decomp_lessons.lesson: In dispatcher-heavy functions, switching through the typed command view and reshaping switch cases can yield large matching gains without necessarily changing file scope.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hsd_803AAA48 switch ((u32) type), cmd->type changes

decomp_lessons.lesson: Expression association and loop-bound operand order can affect MWCC matching; the hsd_3AA7 diff includes a loop bound changed from state->x24 + state->x8 + 0x2F to 0x2F + state->x24 + state->x8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for-loop bound changed near fn around diff line 3651

decomp_lessons.lesson: Local declaration order and temporary lifetime can materially affect stack frame shape and match percentage; MatToQuat improved after q3 declaration ordering and scale/sc temporary lifetime changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: MatToQuat declaration and temporary changes

decomp_lessons.lesson: PAD_STACK can replace an artificial dummy byte array when narrow verification shows a match, but this remains a tactic that should stay explicitly justified by report evidence.

naming_conventions.text: Use role-based short locals when the role is clear: MatToQuat replaced sc0/sc1/sc2 with scale for the reusable scalar factor.
For fighter common code, fp, vic_gobj, and vic_fp are supported local names in this PR slice for fighter, victim GObj, and victim fighter locals.

For hsd_3AA7 CARD code, PR evidence supports cmd and state field access names where structure roles are already expressed, while many unresolved functions remain address-style names such as fn_803ACF30.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit if/else assignment instead of boolean expression when it matches generated code shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: s32 busy = hsd_804D799C == 1 became an explicit if assigning busy = 1 or 0.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reorder switch cases and use continue/return placement to match dispatcher control-flow layout.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: hsd_803AAA48 changed case ordering and command completion paths such as cmd->type = 0; hsd_804D7980 = (hsd_804D7980 + 1) % 128; continue.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inline or extend local value lifetimes selectively to match stack/register allocation.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: MatToQuat removed sc0/sc1/sc2 locals and uses inline normalized matrix diagonal terms plus a single scale temporary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use PAD_STACK only as a narrow, verified stack-shape tactic.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.example: ftCo_8009C744 uses PAD_STACK(8) after removing a dummy u8 array and is reported at 100%.

notes: Strong evidence exists for PR identity, changed files, claimed verification, bot-reported before/after percentages, and approval.

The raw diff in the loaded context is truncated, and hsd_3AA7.c has 94 hunks; only representative diff excerpts were inspected here, so file-wide lessons are limited to claims supported by PR body, bot report, and visible hunks.
There were no loaded inline review comments; approval carries no explanatory body, so reviewer intent is not inferred.
The PR body claims configure --require-protos and ninja verification; no independent build logs beyond the GALE01 bot report are loaded.

accepted_candidate_records.title: MatToQuat near-match improved by local lifetime and temporary cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2580 improved MatToQuat from 95.55% to 99.92% by changing q3 declaration order, removing sc0/sc1/sc2 temporaries, introducing a role-based scale temporary, and adjusting expression grouping. Use as a searchable historical example of local declaration/lifetime changes affecting stack frame and match quality.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PAD_STACK replacement for dummy array in ftCo_8009C744
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2580 changed ftCo_8009C744 from a dummy u8 stack array to PAD_STACK(8), restored ftColl_80078710 call shape, and the bot report shows ftCo_8009C744 reached 100%. Treat as a narrow historical matching tactic, not a general style rule.

source_update_candidates.title: hsd_3AA7.c contains CARD command dispatcher matching work
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2580 evidence shows src/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_3AA7.c includes CARD command/state handling with CARDFastOpen, CARDReadAsync, CARDWriteAsync, CARDClose, CARDGetXferredBytes, hsd_803AAA48 dispatcher control-flow, and multiple fn_803A/803B address-style functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 hsd_3AA7 new matches and improvements
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path-scope metadata for future hsd_3AA7/CARD decomp searches; should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Expression association and declaration lifetime examples from PR #2580
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding PR #2580 as an example under existing standards for natural loops/canonical control flow/matching tactics: small changes to loop-bound operand order, switch dispatch shape, and local temporary lifetimes produced reported match improvements.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: loop bounds, dispatcher/control-flow, local value lifetimes
raw_diff: hsd_3AA7 loop-bound and switch excerpts
source_update_candidates.reason: This should be an example attached to existing standards rather than a new rule; evidence is PR-specific.

rejection_notes: Do not infer semantic names for address-style hsd_3AA7 functions; the PR keeps names such as fn_803ACF30 and does not prove meanings.
Do not promote PAD_STACK as normal style; this PR only supports it as a narrow, verified tactic for ftCo_8009C744.
Do not infer reviewer rationale from the empty approval review.
Do not claim all hsd_3AA7 functions matched; bot evidence shows seven new matches and thirteen improvements, with many listed items still below 100%.
